commands.code: var old=document.querySelector("[holo-radar]");if(old)old.parentNode.removeChild(old);var el=document.createElement("a-entity");el.setAttribute("holo-radar","");el.setAttribute("position","-0.72 1.2 -0.5");el.setAttribute("rotation","90 25 0");document.querySelector("a-scene").appendChild(el);console.log("[hot-swap] holo-radar nudged back toward screen");
